hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'usersecrets|secrets\.json|\.env\b'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: command references a credentials file (usersecrets/secrets.json/.env). Ask the user explicitly before touching credential files."}}'; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qiE 'usersecrets|secrets\.json|\.env$'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: this is a credentials file (usersecrets/secrets.json/.env). Ask the user explicitly before reading credential files."}}'; fi; }
